steps: Start to resemble whipped cream. When the milk reaches soft peaks add the cold oil in a steady stream slowly.
Once whipped transfer to piping bag.
Act fast so that whipped milk doesn't pipe past 8cm height.
Once set cover with yuba and trim to create omelette shape.
Store in container in the fridge.
Using microplane, grate cheese over the omelette.
Serve on small plate and square of grease proof paper.
